items.raw_desc: Érzékelő szenzor Cycplus Sebesség- és kadencia-érzékelő 2in1 Coospo BK467:The Cycplus Coospo BK467 serves as a speed and cadence sensor. You can place it on the wheel hub to measure speed, or on the crank to measure cadence. It has Bluetooth connectivity and supports ANT+. When connected via Bluetooth, it allows pairing with one device, and via ANT+ you can connect it to multiple devices. The sensor is IP67 waterproof. It is powered by a CR2032 battery that will keep it running for approximately 500 hours. The Cycplus Coospo BK467 sensor is compatible with Garmin and mobile apps.
